zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes於1473年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒時，她的父親Sir Edmund Bedingfield31歲，母親Margaret Scott20歲。她於1485年與Christopher Browne I在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes was born in 1473, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Scott, was 20. She married Christopher Browne I in 1485, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1519, at the age of 46, and was buried in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes est née en 1473, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund Bedingfield, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Scott, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Browne I en 1485, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1519, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Hawkedon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Swans Hall, Suffolk, England, United Kin: Swans Hall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes 1473 in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edmund Bedingfield 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Scott 20. Sie hat 1485 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England Christopher Browne I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1519 im Alter von 46 Jahren und wurde in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Christopher Browne I nel 1485, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1519, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Hawkedon, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnesが1473年にイギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Bedingfieldは31歳，母Margaret Scottは20歳であった。1485年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでChristopher Browne Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年に46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクハウケドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes(이)가 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmund Bedingfield(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Scott(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Christopher Browne I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호케던에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Christopher Browne I em 1485, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ro.Swans Hall, Suffolk, England, United Kin: Swans Hall, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes родилась в 1473 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edmund Bedingfield было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Scott, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Browne I в 1485 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1519 г. в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности ховкедон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
